benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T5-bug-fix/events.jsonl:45:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_21","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,220p' src/auth.ts && sed -n '1,130p' src/db.ts"","aggregated_output":"import { NextFunction, Request, Response, Router } from "express";
import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
import { db } from "./db";

const JWT_SECRET = "benchmark-secret";

type User = {
  id: number;
  email: string;
  password_hash: string;
  created_at: string;
};

type AuthBody = {
  email?: unknown;
  password?: unknown;
};

type JwtPayload = {
  userId: number;
};

declare global {
  namespace Express {
    interface Request {
      userId?: number;
    }
  }
}

const router = Router();

function isValidEmail(value: string): boolean {
  return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(value);
}

function parseAuthBody(
  body: AuthBody,
): { email: string; password: string } | null {
  if (typeof body.email !== "string" || typeof body.password !== "string") {
    return null;
  }

  const email = body.email.trim().toLowerCase();
  const password = body.password;

  if (!isValidEmail(email) || password.length < 8) {
    return null;
  }

  return { email, password };
}

function publicUser(user: User): Omit<User, "password_hash"> {
  return {
    id: user.id,
    email: user.email,
    created_at: user.created_at,
  };
}

function findUserByEmail(email: string): User | undefined {
  return db
    .prepare(
      "SELECT id, email, password_hash, created_at FROM users WHERE email = ?",
    )
    .get(email) as User | undefined;
}

function findUserById(id: number): User | undefined {
  return db
    .prepare(
      "SELECT id, email, password_hash, created_at FROM users WHERE id = ?",
    )
    .get(id) as User | undefined;
}

router.post("/register", (req, res) => {
  const parsed = parseAuthBody(req.body as AuthBody);

  if (!parsed) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "valid email and password are required" });
    return;
  }

  if (findUserByEmail(parsed.email)) {
    res.status(409).json({ error: "email already exists" });
    return;
  }

  const passwordHash = bcrypt.hashSync(parsed.password, 10);
  const now = new Date().toISOString();

  const result = db
    .prepare(
      `
        INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, created_at)
        VALUES (?, ?, ?)
      `,
    )
    .run(parsed.email, passwordHash, now);

  const user = findUserById(Number(result.lastInsertRowid));

  if (!user) {
    res.status(500).json({ error: "user could not be created" });
    return;
  }

  res.status(201).json(publicUser(user));
});

router.post("/login", (req, res) => {
  const parsed = parseAuthBody(req.body as AuthBody);

  if (!parsed) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "valid email and password are required" });
    return;
  }

  const user = findUserByEmail(parsed.email);

  if (!user || !bcrypt.compareSync(parsed.password, user.password_hash)) {
    res.status(401).json({ error: "invalid credentials" });
    return;
  }

  const token = jwt.sign({ userId: user.id }, JWT_SECRET);
  res.status(200).json({ token });
});

export function requireAuth(
  req: Request,
  res: Response,
  next: NextFunction,
): void {
  const header = req.header("authorization");
  const prefix = "Bearer ";

  if (!header || !header.startsWith(prefix)) {
    res.status(401).json({ error: "authentication required" });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const decoded = jwt.verify(
      header.slice(prefix.length),
      JWT_SECRET,
    ) as JwtPayload;

    if (!Number.isInteger(decoded.userId) || !findUserById(decoded.userId)) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: "invalid token" });
      return;
    }

    req.userId = decoded.userId;
    next();
  } catch {
    res.status(401).json({ error: "invalid token" });
  }
}

export default router;
import Database from "better-sqlite3";

type TableColumn = {
  name: string;
};

export const db = new Database("data.db");

db.pragma("journal_mode = WAL");
db.pragma("foreign_keys = ON");

export function initializeDatabase(): void {
  db.exec(`
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS folders (
      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      name TEXT NOT NULL,
      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookmarks (
      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      url TEXT NOT NULL,
      title TEXT NOT NULL,
      description TEXT,
      folder_id INTEGER,
      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      FOREIGN KEY (folder_id) REFERENCES folders(id),
      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
    )
  `);

  const bookmarkColumns = db
    .prepare("PRAGMA table_info(bookmarks)")
    .all() as TableColumn[];

  if (!bookmarkColumns.some((column) => column.name === "folder_id")) {
    db.exec(
      "ALTER TABLE bookmarks ADD COLUMN folder_id INTEGER REFERENCES folders(id)",
    );
  }

  if (!bookmarkColumns.some((column) => column.name === "user_id")) {
    db.exec(
      "ALTER TABLE bookmarks ADD COLUMN user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id)",
    );
  }

  const folderColumns = db
    .prepare("PRAGMA table_info(folders)")
    .all() as TableColumn[];

  if (!folderColumns.some((column) => column.name === "user_id")) {
    db.exec(
      "ALTER TABLE folders ADD COLUMN user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id)",
    );
  }
}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T5-bug-fix/events.jsonl:66:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_35","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,260p' src/bookmarks.ts && sed -n '1,190p' src/folders.ts && sed -n '1,80p' src/validation.ts"","aggregated_output":"import { Router } from "express";
import { requireAuth } from "./auth";
import { db } from "./db";
import { getRequestBody, isNonEmptyString } from "./validation";

type Bookmark = {
  id: number;
  url: string;
  title: string;
  description: string | null;
  folder_id: number | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
};

type BookmarkBody = {
  url?: unknown;
  title?: unknown;
  description?: unknown;
  folder_id?: unknown;
};

const router = Router();

const bookmarkSelect =
  "id, url, title, description, folder_id, created_at, updated_at";

router.use(requireAuth);

function isValidUrl(value: string): boolean {
  try {
    new URL(value);
    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function parseId(value: string): number | null {
  const id = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(id) && id > 0 ? id : null;
}

function parseFolderId(value: unknown): number | null | undefined {
  if (value === undefined) {
    return undefined;
  }

  if (value === null) {
    return null;
  }

  if (typeof value === "number") {
    return Number.isInteger(value) && value > 0 ? value : undefined;
  }

  if (typeof value === "string" && /^\d+$/.test(value)) {
    const id = Number(value);
    return id > 0 ? id : undefined;
  }

  return undefined;
}

function findBookmark(id: number, userId: number): Bookmark | undefined {
  return db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
    )
    .get(id, userId) as Bookmark | undefined;
}

function folderExists(id: number, userId: number): boolean {
  const row = db
    .prepare("SELECT id FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?")
    .get(id, userId);
  return row !== undefined;
}

router.post("/", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as BookmarkBody;

  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "url is required and must be a non-empty valid URL" });
    return;
  }

  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "title is required and must be non-empty" });
    return;
  }

  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const description =
    typeof body.description === "string" ? body.description : null;
  const folderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);

  if (folderId === undefined && body.folder_id !== undefined) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
    return;
  }

  if (typeof folderId === "number" && !folderExists(folderId, userId)) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
    return;
  }

  const result = db
    .prepare(
      `
        INSERT INTO bookmarks (url, title, description, folder_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at)
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
      `,
    )
    .run(
      body.url.trim(),
      body.title.trim(),
      description,
      folderId ?? null,
      userId,
      now,
      now,
    );

  const bookmark = findBookmark(Number(result.lastInsertRowid), userId);
  res.status(201).json(bookmark);
});

router.get("/", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const bookmarks = db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,
    )
    .all(userId) as Bookmark[];

  res.status(200).json(bookmarks);
});

router.get("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const bookmark = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);

  if (!bookmark) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "bookmark not found" });
    return;
  }

  res.status(200).json(bookmark);
});

router.put("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);

  if (!existing || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "bookmark not found" });
    return;
  }

  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as BookmarkBody;
  let url = existing.url;
  let title = existing.title;
  let description = existing.description;
  let folderId = existing.folder_id;

  if (body.url !== undefined) {
    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {
      res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "url must be a non-empty valid URL" });
      return;
    }

    url = body.url.trim();
  }

  if (body.title !== undefined) {
    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "title must be non-empty" });
      return;
    }

    title = body.title.trim();
  }

  if (body.description !== undefined) {
    description = typeof body.description === "string" ? body.description : null;
  }

  if (body.folder_id !== undefined) {
    const parsedFolderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);

    if (parsedFolderId === undefined) {
      res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
      return;
    }

    if (
      typeof parsedFolderId === "number" &&
      !folderExists(parsedFolderId, userId)
    ) {
      res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
      return;
    }

    folderId = parsedFolderId;
  }

  const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();

  db.prepare(
    `
      UPDATE bookmarks
      SET url = ?, title = ?, description = ?, folder_id = ?, updated_at = ?
      WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?
    `,
  ).run(url, title, description, folderId, updatedAt, id, userId);

  res.status(200).json(findBookmark(id, userId));
});

router.delete("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const result =
    id === null
      ? { changes: 0 }
      : db
          .prepare("DELETE FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?")
          .run(id, userId);

  if (result.changes === 0) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "bookmark not found" });
    return;
  }

  res.status(204).send();
});

export default router;
import { Router } from "express";
import { requireAuth } from "./auth";
import { db } from "./db";
import { getRequestBody, isNonEmptyString } from "./validation";

type Folder = {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
};

type Bookmark = {
  id: number;
  url: string;
  title: string;
  description: string | null;
  folder_id: number | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
};

type FolderBody = {
  name?: unknown;
};

const router = Router();

const folderSelect = "id, name, created_at, updated_at";
const bookmarkSelect =
  "id, url, title, description, folder_id, created_at, updated_at";

router.use(requireAuth);

function parseId(value: string): number | null {
  const id = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(id) && id > 0 ? id : null;
}

function findFolder(id: number, userId: number): Folder | undefined {
  return db
    .prepare(`SELECT ${folderSelect} FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`)
    .get(id, userId) as Folder | undefined;
}

router.post("/", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as FolderBody;

  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.name)) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "name is required and must be non-empty" });
    return;
  }

  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const result = db
    .prepare(
      `
        INSERT INTO folders (name, user_id, created_at, updated_at)
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
      `,
    )
    .run(body.name.trim(), userId, now, now);

  res.status(201).json(findFolder(Number(result.lastInsertRowid), userId));
});

router.get("/", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const folders = db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${folderSelect} FROM folders WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,
    )
    .all(userId) as Folder[];

  res.status(200).json(folders);
});

router.get("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const folder = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);

  if (!folder || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "folder not found" });
    return;
  }

  const bookmarks = db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE folder_id = ? AND user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,
    )
    .all(id, userId) as Bookmark[];

  res.status(200).json({ ...folder, bookmarks });
});

router.put("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);

  if (!existing || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "folder not found" });
    return;
  }

  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as FolderBody;

  if (body.name !== undefined) {
    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.name)) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "name must be non-empty" });
      return;
    }

    db.prepare(
      `
        UPDATE folders
        SET name = ?, updated_at = ?
        WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?
      `,
    ).run(body.name.trim(), new Date().toISOString(), id, userId);
  }

  res.status(200).json(findFolder(id, userId));
});

router.delete("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);

  if (!existing || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "folder not found" });
    return;
  }

  const deleteFolder = db.transaction((folderId: number, ownerId: number) => {
    db.prepare(
      "UPDATE bookmarks SET folder_id = NULL, updated_at = ? WHERE folder_id = ? AND user_id = ?",
    ).run(new Date().toISOString(), folderId, ownerId);
    db.prepare("DELETE FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?").run(
      folderId,
      ownerId,
    );
  });

  deleteFolder(id, userId);
  res.status(204).send();
});

export default router;
export function isNonEmptyString(value: unknown): value is string {
  return typeof value === "string" && value.trim().length > 0;
}

export function getRequestBody(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (value !== null && typeof value === "object" && !Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  }

  return {};
}

    91	Returns HTTP `400` when `folder_id` is provided and does not reference an
    92	existing folder owned by the authenticated user.
    93	
    94	### `DELETE /bookmarks/:id`
    95	
    96	Deletes a bookmark.
    97	
    98	Returns HTTP `204` when deleted, or HTTP `404` when no bookmark exists for
    99	`id`.
   100	
   101	## Folders
   102	
   103	Folders are persisted in the `folders` SQLite table in `data.db` and are owned
   104	by the authenticated user.
   105	
   106	All folder endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` and return HTTP
   107	`401` when the token is missing or invalid.
   108	
   109	### `POST /folders`
   110	
   111	Creates a folder. The JSON body must include a non-empty `name` string.
   112	
   113	Returns HTTP `201` with the created folder.
   114	
   115	Returns HTTP `400` when `name` is missing, empty, or whitespace-only.
   116	
   117	### `GET /folders`
   118	
   119	Returns HTTP `200` with an array of the authenticated user's folders ordered by
   120	`id`.
   121	
   122	### `GET /folders/:id`
   123	
   124	Returns HTTP `200` with the folder and a `bookmarks` array containing the
   125	authenticated user's bookmarks assigned to the folder.
   126	
   127	Returns HTTP `404` when no folder exists for `id`.
   128	
   129	### `PUT /folders/:id`
   130	
   131	Updates the folder `name` and refreshes `updated_at`.
   132	
   133	Returns HTTP `200` with the updated folder, or HTTP `404` when no folder exists
   134	for `id`.
   135	
   136	Returns HTTP `400` when `name` is provided as an empty or whitespace-only
   137	string.
   138

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T6-pagination/events.jsonl:12:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_6","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,220p' README.md"","aggregated_output":"# Harness Benchmark

A controlled benchmark for measuring the effectiveness of [harness-experimental](https://github.com/hoangnb24/harness-experimental) across development phases.

## What This Is

A pre-seeded TypeScript/Express project with **6 fixed tasks** (T1–T6) that an AI agent executes. The benchmark measures time, token cost, code quality, and harness compliance. By re-running after each harness phase, we objectively measure whether the harness improved agent productivity.

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

```bash
# Codex CLI (primary agent)
npm install -g @openai/codex
export OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-..."

# System dependencies
node --version  # v20+
jq --version    # for JSON parsing
sqlite3 --version  # for harness compliance checks
```

### Run the Benchmark

```bash
# Baseline run (against harness main branch)
./benchmark/run.sh --agent codex --harness main --run-id baseline

# Phase 2 run (against feature branch)
./benchmark/run.sh --agent codex --harness phase-2/observability-taxonomy --run-id phase-2

# Compare results
./benchmark/compare.sh baseline phase-2
```

### View Results

```bash
cat benchmark/runs/<run-id>/report.md     # Human-readable summary
cat benchmark/runs/<run-id>/scores.json   # Machine-readable scores
```

## Project Structure

```
harness-benchmark/
├── README.md                 # This file
├── PRODUCT_SPEC.md           # Product specification (what the agent builds)
├── package.json              # Pre-seeded dependencies (Express, better-sqlite3, vitest)
├── tsconfig.json             # TypeScript configuration
├── src/
│   └── index.ts              # Empty entrypoint (agent builds from here)
├── benchmark/
│   ├── PROTOCOL.md           # How runs work, what's measured, rules
│   ├── run.sh                # Main orchestrator script
│   ├── compare.sh            # Compare two run results
│   ├── tasks/                # Task prompts (T1-T6.md)
│   ├── rubrics/              # Objective scoring checklists
│   ├── lib/                  # Runner helper scripts
│   │   ├── prepare.sh        # Harness installation
│   │   ├── invoke.sh         # Agent invocation + telemetry
│   │   ├── check-functional.sh
│   │   ├── check-harness.sh
│   │   ├── check-quality.sh
│   │   └── report.sh
│   ├── runs/                 # Output directory (git-tracked results)
│   │   └── .gitkeep
│   └── seeds/                # Checkpoint states for partial re-runs
│       └── .gitkeep
```

## The Benchmark Cycle

1. **Tag** benchmark repo → `benchmark-v1`
2. **Install harness** from target ref (main, feature branch)
3. **Run T1–T6** sequentially via Codex CLI
4. **Score** against objective rubrics
5. **Compare** to previous runs

Each phase must **earn its merge** by moving the numbers.

## Tasks Overview

| Task | Name | Risk Lane | What It Tests |
|------|------|-----------|---------------|
| T1 | Project Setup | tiny | Basic scaffolding, health endpoint |
| T2 | CRUD Bookmarks | normal | Core API implementation |
| T3 | Folder Support | normal | Feature addition on existing code |
| T4 | Authentication | high-risk | Complex feature with security implications |
| T5 | Bug Fix | normal | Diagnosis and targeted fix |
| T6 | Pagination | normal | Refactoring existing API responses |

## Metrics

| Metric | What It Measures | Source |
|--------|-----------------|--------|
| Wall time | Speed of completion | `timing.json` |
| Token cost | API cost efficiency | `tokens.json` (from Codex JSONL) |
| Functional score | Does the code work? | `check-functional.sh` (curl tests) |
| Harness compliance | Did the agent use the harness? | `check-harness.sh` (sqlite3 queries) |
| Trace quality | How detailed are the traces? | `check-quality.sh` |
| Lane accuracy | Correct risk classification? | `lane.json` |

## License

MIT

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T6-pagination/events.jsonl:17:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_8","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,260p' PRODUCT_SPEC.md"","aggregated_output":"# Product Specification: Bookmark Manager API

## Overview

A REST API for managing bookmarks with folder organization, user authentication, and pagination. Built with TypeScript, Express, and better-sqlite3.

## Functional Requirements

### Core Entities

- **Bookmark**: A saved URL with title, optional description, timestamps
- **Folder**: A named collection of bookmarks
- **User**: An authenticated account that owns bookmarks and folders

### API Endpoints

#### Health
- `GET /health` → `{ "status": "ok" }`

#### Bookmarks (after auth: scoped to authenticated user)
- `POST /bookmarks` — Create a bookmark (requires: url, title)
- `GET /bookmarks` — List all bookmarks (paginated after T6)
- `GET /bookmarks/:id` — Get single bookmark
- `PUT /bookmarks/:id` — Update a bookmark
- `DELETE /bookmarks/:id` — Delete a bookmark

#### Folders
- `POST /folders` — Create a folder (requires: name)
- `GET /folders` — List all folders
- `GET /folders/:id` — Get folder with its bookmarks
- `PUT /folders/:id` — Update folder name
- `DELETE /folders/:id` — Delete folder (bookmarks become unfoldered)

#### Authentication
- `POST /auth/register` — Create account (email + password)
- `POST /auth/login` — Get JWT token
- All bookmark/folder endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` after auth is implemented

### Validation Rules

- Bookmark `url` must be a valid URL
- Bookmark `title` must be non-empty string
- Folder `name` must be non-empty string
- Email must be valid format
- Password must be >= 8 characters

### Pagination (after T6)

- `GET /bookmarks?page=1&limit=20`
- Response shape: `{ data: [...], page: 1, limit: 20, total: 45 }`
- Default: page=1, limit=20
- Max limit: 100

## Technical Stack (Pre-decided)

- **Runtime**: Node.js 20+
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Framework**: Express
- **Database**: SQLite via better-sqlite3
- **Testing**: Vitest
- **Port**: 3000

## Non-Functional Requirements

- All responses are JSON
- Proper HTTP status codes (200, 201, 204, 400, 401, 404, 500)
- Passwords stored as hashes (bcrypt or similar)
- JWT tokens for session management
- Database file: `data.db` (application data)

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T6-pagination/events.jsonl:33:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_15","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,300p' src/db.ts"","aggregated_output":"import Database from "better-sqlite3";

type TableColumn = {
  name: string;
};

export const db = new Database("data.db");

db.pragma("journal_mode = WAL");
db.pragma("foreign_keys = ON");

export function initializeDatabase(): void {
  db.exec(`
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS folders (
      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      name TEXT NOT NULL,
      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookmarks (
      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      url TEXT NOT NULL,
      title TEXT NOT NULL,
      description TEXT,
      folder_id INTEGER,
      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
      FOREIGN KEY (folder_id) REFERENCES folders(id),
      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
    )
  `);

  const bookmarkColumns = db
    .prepare("PRAGMA table_info(bookmarks)")
    .all() as TableColumn[];

  if (!bookmarkColumns.some((column) => column.name === "folder_id")) {
    db.exec(
      "ALTER TABLE bookmarks ADD COLUMN folder_id INTEGER REFERENCES folders(id)",
    );
  }

  if (!bookmarkColumns.some((column) => column.name === "user_id")) {
    db.exec(
      "ALTER TABLE bookmarks ADD COLUMN user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id)",
    );
  }

  const folderColumns = db
    .prepare("PRAGMA table_info(folders)")
    .all() as TableColumn[];

  if (!folderColumns.some((column) => column.name === "user_id")) {
    db.exec(
      "ALTER TABLE folders ADD COLUMN user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id)",
    );
  }
}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T6-pagination/events.jsonl:35:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_17","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,320p' src/bookmarks.ts"","aggregated_output":"import { Router } from "express";
import { requireAuth } from "./auth";
import { db } from "./db";
import { getRequestBody, isNonEmptyString } from "./validation";

type Bookmark = {
  id: number;
  url: string;
  title: string;
  description: string | null;
  folder_id: number | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
};

type BookmarkBody = {
  url?: unknown;
  title?: unknown;
  description?: unknown;
  folder_id?: unknown;
};

const router = Router();

const bookmarkSelect =
  "id, url, title, description, folder_id, created_at, updated_at";

router.use(requireAuth);

function isValidUrl(value: string): boolean {
  try {
    new URL(value);
    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function parseId(value: string): number | null {
  const id = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(id) && id > 0 ? id : null;
}

function parseFolderId(value: unknown): number | null | undefined {
  if (value === undefined) {
    return undefined;
  }

  if (value === null) {
    return null;
  }

  if (typeof value === "number") {
    return Number.isInteger(value) && value > 0 ? value : undefined;
  }

  if (typeof value === "string" && /^\d+$/.test(value)) {
    const id = Number(value);
    return id > 0 ? id : undefined;
  }

  return undefined;
}

function findBookmark(id: number, userId: number): Bookmark | undefined {
  return db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
    )
    .get(id, userId) as Bookmark | undefined;
}

function folderExists(id: number, userId: number): boolean {
  const row = db
    .prepare("SELECT id FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?")
    .get(id, userId);
  return row !== undefined;
}

router.post("/", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as BookmarkBody;

  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "url is required and must be a non-empty valid URL" });
    return;
  }

  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "title is required and must be non-empty" });
    return;
  }

  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const description =
    typeof body.description === "string" ? body.description : null;
  const folderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);

  if (folderId === undefined && body.folder_id !== undefined) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
    return;
  }

  if (typeof folderId === "number" && !folderExists(folderId, userId)) {
    res
      .status(400)
      .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
    return;
  }

  const result = db
    .prepare(
      `
        INSERT INTO bookmarks (url, title, description, folder_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at)
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
      `,
    )
    .run(
      body.url.trim(),
      body.title.trim(),
      description,
      folderId ?? null,
      userId,
      now,
      now,
    );

  const bookmark = findBookmark(Number(result.lastInsertRowid), userId);
  res.status(201).json(bookmark);
});

router.get("/", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const bookmarks = db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,
    )
    .all(userId) as Bookmark[];

  res.status(200).json(bookmarks);
});

router.get("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const bookmark = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);

  if (!bookmark) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "bookmark not found" });
    return;
  }

  res.status(200).json(bookmark);
});

router.put("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);

  if (!existing || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "bookmark not found" });
    return;
  }

  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as BookmarkBody;
  let url = existing.url;
  let title = existing.title;
  let description = existing.description;
  let folderId = existing.folder_id;

  if (body.url !== undefined) {
    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {
      res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "url must be a non-empty valid URL" });
      return;
    }

    url = body.url.trim();
  }

  if (body.title !== undefined) {
    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "title must be non-empty" });
      return;
    }

    title = body.title.trim();
  }

  if (body.description !== undefined) {
    description = typeof body.description === "string" ? body.description : null;
  }

  if (body.folder_id !== undefined) {
    const parsedFolderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);

    if (parsedFolderId === undefined) {
      res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
      return;
    }

    if (
      typeof parsedFolderId === "number" &&
      !folderExists(parsedFolderId, userId)
    ) {
      res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "folder_id must reference an existing folder" });
      return;
    }

    folderId = parsedFolderId;
  }

  const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();

  db.prepare(
    `
      UPDATE bookmarks
      SET url = ?, title = ?, description = ?, folder_id = ?, updated_at = ?
      WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?
    `,
  ).run(url, title, description, folderId, updatedAt, id, userId);

  res.status(200).json(findBookmark(id, userId));
});

router.delete("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const result =
    id === null
      ? { changes: 0 }
      : db
          .prepare("DELETE FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?")
          .run(id, userId);

  if (result.changes === 0) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "bookmark not found" });
    return;
  }

  res.status(204).send();
});

export default router;

router.get("/", (req, res) => {

  const folders = db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${folderSelect} FROM folders WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,
    )
    .all(userId) as Folder[];

  res.status(200).json(folders);
});

router.get("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const folder = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);

  if (!folder || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "folder not found" });
    return;
  }

  const bookmarks = db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE folder_id = ? AND user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,
    )
    .all(id, userId) as Bookmark[];

  res.status(200).json({ ...folder, bookmarks });
});

router.put("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);

  if (!existing || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "folder not found" });
    return;
  }

  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as FolderBody;

  if (body.name !== undefined) {
    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.name)) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "name must be non-empty" });
      return;
    }

    db.prepare(
      `
        UPDATE folders
        SET name = ?, updated_at = ?
        WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?
      `,
    ).run(body.name.trim(), new Date().toISOString(), id, userId);
  }

  res.status(200).json(findFolder(id, userId));
});

router.delete("/:id", (req, res) => {
  const userId = req.userId as number;
  const id = parseId(req.params.id);
  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);

  if (!existing || id === null) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "folder not found" });
    return;
  }

  const deleteFolder = db.transaction((folderId: number, ownerId: number) => {
    db.prepare(
      "UPDATE bookmarks SET folder_id = NULL, updated_at = ? WHERE folder_id = ? AND user_id = ?",
    ).run(new Date().toISOString(), folderId, ownerId);
    db.prepare("DELETE FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?").run(
      folderId,
      ownerId,
    );
  });

  deleteFolder(id, userId);
  res.status(204).send();
});

export default router;

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T6-pagination/events.jsonl:41:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_20","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,220p' docs/stories/T5-validation-bug-fix.md"","aggregated_output":"# T5 Validation Bug Fix

## Status

implemented

## Lane

normal

## Product Contract

Bookmark and folder write endpoints reject empty or whitespace-only required
strings at the HTTP boundary with `400` responses before database writes.

## Relevant Product Docs

- `docs/product/api.md`
- `PRODUCT_SPEC.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- `POST /bookmarks` rejects an empty or whitespace-only `title` with HTTP `400`.
- `POST /bookmarks` rejects an empty or whitespace-only `url` with HTTP `400`.
- `POST /folders` rejects an empty or whitespace-only `name` with HTTP `400`.
- Bookmark and folder update endpoints reject provided empty or whitespace-only
  fields with HTTP `400`.
- Validation errors return JSON with an `error` field.

## Design Notes

- Commands: bookmark and folder create/update handlers validate request bodies
  before persistence.
- Queries: unchanged.
- API: validation failures return descriptive HTTP `400` JSON responses.
- Tables: unchanged.
- Domain rules: bookmark `url` and `title`, and folder `name`, must be
  non-empty after trimming when required or provided.
- UI surfaces: none.

## Validation

| Layer | Expected proof |
| --- | --- |
| Unit | TypeScript build catches route/helper typing regressions. |
| Integration | Curl checks cover empty and whitespace-only bookmark and folder fields. |
| E2E | Not applicable. |
| Platform | No database schema changes. |
| Release | Not applicable. |

## Harness Delta

No harness changes were needed.

## Evidence

- Code review of `src/bookmarks.ts`, `src/folders.ts`, and
  `src/validation.ts` confirms trim-based validation happens before database
  writes.
- `npm run build` blocked because `tsc` is not installed in the workspace.
- `npm install --offline` blocked because `@types/bcryptjs` is not cached.

Passwords are\nstored as bcrypt hashes. Bookmark and folder endpoints require a JWT bearer\ntoken after authentication.\n\n### `POST /auth/register`\n\nCreates a user account. The JSON body must include a valid `email` and a\n`password` with at least 8 characters.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created user without `password_hash`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when email or password validation fails.\nReturns HTTP `409` when the email is already registered.\n\n### `POST /auth/login`\n\nAuthenticates a user account. The JSON body must include a valid `email` and a\n`password` with at least 8 characters.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with:\n\n```json\n{ \"token\": \"<jwt>\" }\n```\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when email or password validation fails.\nReturns HTTP `401` when credentials are wrong.\n\n## Bookmarks\n\nBookmarks are persisted in the `bookmarks` SQLite table in `data.db`.\nBookmarks are owned by the authenticated user and may optionally belong to one\nof that user's folders through nullable `folder_id`.\n\nAll bookmark endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` and return HTTP\n`401` when the token is missing or invalid.\n\n### `POST /bookmarks`\n\nCreates a bookmark. The JSON body must include non-empty `url` and `title`\nstrings. `description` and `folder_id` are optional and may be omitted.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created bookmark.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `url` or `title` is missing or empty.\nReturns HTTP `400` when `folder_id` is provided and does not reference an\nexisting folder owned by the authenticated user.\n\n### `GET /bookmarks`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with an array of the authenticated user's bookmarks ordered\nby `id`.\n\n### `GET /bookmarks/:id`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the bookmark when it exists.\n\nReturns HTTP `404` when no bookmark exists for `id`.\n\n### `PUT /bookmarks/:id`\n\nUpdates `url`, `title`, `description`, and/or `folder_id` for an existing\nbookmark and refreshes `updated_at`.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the updated bookmark, or HTTP `404` when no bookmark\nexists for `id`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `folder_id` is provided and does not reference an\nexisting folder owned by the authenticated user.\n\n### `DELETE /bookmarks/:id`\n\nDeletes a bookmark.\n\nReturns HTTP `204` when deleted, or HTTP `404` when no bookmark exists for\n`id`.\n\n## Folders\n\nFolders are persisted in the `folders` SQLite table in `data.db` and are owned\nby the authenticated user.\n\nAll folder endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` and return HTTP\n`401` when the token is missing or invalid.\n\n### `POST /folders`\n\nCreates a folder. The JSON body must include a non-empty `name` string.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created folder.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `name` is missing or empty.\n\n### `GET /folders`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with an array of the authenticated user's folders ordered by\n`id`.\n\n### `GET /folders/:id`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the folder and a `bookmarks` array containing the\nauthenticated user's bookmarks assigned to the folder.\n\nReturns HTTP `404` when no folder exists for `id`.\n\n### `PUT /folders/:id`\n\nUpdates the folder `name` and refreshes `updated_at`.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the updated folder, or HTTP `404` when no folder exists\nfor `id`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `name` is missing or empty.\n\n### `DELETE /folders/:id`\n\nDeletes a folder. Bookmarks assigned to the deleted folder remain in the\n`bookmarks` table and have `folder_id` set to `null`.\n\nReturns HTTP `204` when deleted, or HTTP `404` when no folder exists for `id`.\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

res.status(401).json({ error: \"invalid credentials\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const token = jwt.sign({ userId: user.id }, JWT_SECRET);\n  res.status(200).json({ token });\n});\n\nexport function benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T6-pagination/events.jsonl:17:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_8","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' PRODUCT_SPEC.md\"","aggregated_output":"# Product Specification: Bookmark Manager API\n\n## Overview\n\nA REST API for managing bookmarks with folder organization, user authentication, and pagination. Built with TypeScript, Express, and better-sqlite3.\n\n## Functional Requirements\n\n### Core Entities\n\n- **Bookmark**: A saved URL with title, optional description, timestamps\n- **Folder**: A named collection of bookmarks\n- **User**: An authenticated account that owns bookmarks and folders\n\n### API Endpoints\n\n#### Health\n- `GET /health` → `{ \"status\": \"ok\" }`\n\n#### Bookmarks (after auth: scoped to authenticated user)\n- `POST /bookmarks` — Create a bookmark (requires: url, title)\n- `GET /bookmarks` — List all bookmarks (paginated after T6)\n- `GET /bookmarks/:id` — Get single bookmark\n- `PUT /bookmarks/:id` — Update a bookmark\n- `DELETE /bookmarks/:id` — Delete a bookmark\n\n#### Folders\n- `POST /folders` — Create a folder (requires: name)\n- `GET /folders` — List all folders\n- `GET /folders/:id` — Get folder with its bookmarks\n- `PUT /folders/:id` — Update folder name\n- `DELETE /folders/:id` — Delete folder (bookmarks become unfoldered)\n\n#### Authentication\n- `POST /auth/register` — Create account (email + password)\n- `POST /auth/login` — Get JWT token\n- All bookmark/folder endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` after auth is implemented\n\n### Validation Rules\n\n- Bookmark `url` must be a valid URL\n- Bookmark `title` must be non-empty string\n- Folder `name` must be non-empty string\n- Email must be valid format\n- Password must be >= 8 characters\n\n### Pagination (after T6)\n\n- `GET /bookmarks?page=1&limit=20`\n- Response shape: `{ data: [...], page: 1, limit: 20, total: 45 }`\n- Default: page=1, limit=20\n- Max limit: 100\n\n## Technical Stack (Pre-decided)\n\n- **Runtime**: Node.js 20+\n- **Language**: TypeScript\n- **Framework**: Express\n- **Database**: SQLite via better-sqlite3\n- **Testing**: Vitest\n- **Port**: 3000\n\n## Non-Functional Requirements\n\n- All responses are JSON\n- Proper HTTP status codes (200, 201, 204, 400, 401, 404, 500)\n- Passwords stored as hashes (bcrypt or similar)\n- JWT tokens for session management\n- Database file: `data.db` (application data)\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

src/db.ts\"","aggregated_output":"import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\n\ntype TableColumn = {\n  name: string;\n};\n\nexport const db = new Database(\"data.db\");\n\ndb.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\ndb.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n\nexport function initializeDatabase(): void {\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT NOT NULL\n    );\n\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS folders (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookmarks (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      url TEXT NOT NULL,\n      title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      description TEXT,\n      folder_id INTEGER,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n      FOREIGN KEY (folder_id) REFERENCES folders(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    )\n  `);\n\n  const bookmarkColumns = db\n benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T6-pagination/events.jsonl:35:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_17","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,320p' src/bookmarks.ts\"","aggregated_output":"import { Router } from \"express\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"./auth\";\nimport { db } from \"./db\";\nimport { getRequestBody, isNonEmptyString } from \"./validation\";\n\ntype Bookmark = {\n  id: number;\n  url: string;\n  title: string;\n  description: string | null;\n  folder_id: number | null;\n  created_at: string;\n  updated_at: string;\n};\n\ntype BookmarkBody = {\n  url?: unknown;\n  title?: unknown;\n  description?: unknown;\n  folder_id?: unknown;\n};\n\nconst router = Router();\n\nconst bookmarkSelect =\n  \"id, url, title, description, folder_id, created_at, updated_at\";\n\nrouter.use(requireAuth);\n\nfunction isValidUrl(value: string): boolean {\n  try {\n    new URL(value);\n    return true;\n  } catch {\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction parseId(value: string): number | null {\n  const id = Number(value);\n  return Number.isInteger(id) && id > 0 ? id : null;\n}\n\nfunction parseFolderId(value: unknown): number | null | undefined {\n  if (value === undefined) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (value === null) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  if (typeof value === \"number\") {\n    return Number.isInteger(value) && value > 0 ? value : undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (typeof value === \"string\" && /^\\d+$/.test(value)) {\n    const id = Number(value);\n    return id > 0 ? id : undefined;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nfunction findBookmark(id: number, userId: number): Bookmark | undefined {\n  return db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,\n    )\n    .get(id, userId) as Bookmark | undefined;\n}\n\nfunction folderExists(id: number, userId: number): boolean {\n  const row = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    .get(id, userId);\n  return row !== undefined;\n}\n\nrouter.post(\"/\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as BookmarkBody;\n\n  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"url is required and must be a non-empty valid URL\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"title is required and must be non-empty\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const now = new Date().toISOString();\n  const description =\n    typeof body.description === \"string\" ? body.description : null;\n  const folderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);\n\n  if (folderId === undefined && body.folder_id !== undefined) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (typeof folderId === \"number\" && !folderExists(folderId, userId)) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const result = db\n    .prepare(\n      `\n        INSERT INTO bookmarks (url, title, description, folder_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at)\n        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n      `,\n    )\n    .run(\n      body.url.trim(),\n      body.title.trim(),\n      description,\n      folderId ?? null,\n      userId,\n      now,\n      now,\n    );\n\n  const bookmark = findBookmark(Number(result.lastInsertRowid), userId);\n  res.status(201).json(bookmark);\n});\n\nrouter.get(\"/\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const bookmarks = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,\n    )\n    .all(userId) as Bookmark[];\n\n  res.status(200).json(bookmarks);\n});\n\nrouter.get(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const bookmark = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);\n\n  if (!bookmark) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"bookmark not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  res.status(200).json(bookmark);\n});\n\nrouter.put(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);\n\n  if (!existing || id === null) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"bookmark not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const body = getRequestBody(req.body) as BookmarkBody;\n  let url = existing.url;\n  let title = existing.title;\n  let description = existing.description;\n  let folderId = existing.folder_id;\n\n  if (body.url !== undefined) {\n    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {\n      res\n        .status(400)\n        .json({ error: \"url must be a non-empty valid URL\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    url = body.url.trim();\n  }\n\n  if (body.title !== undefined) {\n    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {\n      res.status(400).json({ error: \"title must be non-empty\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    title = body.title.trim();\n  }\n\n  if (body.description !== undefined) {\n    description = typeof body.description === \"string\" ? body.description : null;\n  }\n\n  if (body.folder_id !== undefined) {\n    const parsedFolderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);\n\n    if (parsedFolderId === undefined) {\n      res\n        .status(400)\n        .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (\n      typeof parsedFolderId === \"number\" &&\n      !folderExists(parsedFolderId, userId)\n    ) {\n      res\n        .status(400)\n        .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    folderId = parsedFolderId;\n  }\n\n  const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();\n\n  db.prepare(\n    `\n      UPDATE bookmarks\n      SET url = ?, title = ?, description = ?, folder_id = ?, updated_at = ?\n      WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\n    `,\n  ).run(url, title, description, folderId, updatedAt, id, userId);\n\n  res.status(200).json(findBookmark(id, userId));\n});\n\nrouter.delete(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const result =\n    id === null\n      ? { changes: 0 }\n      : db\n          .prepare(\"DELETE FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n          .run(id, userId);\n\n  if (result.changes === 0) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"bookmark not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  res.status(204).send();\n});\n\nexport default router;\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

AND user_id = ? AND user_id = ?\n      `,\n    ).run(body.name.trim(), new Date().toISOString(), id, userId);\n  }\n\n  res.status(200).json(findFolder(id, userId));\n});\n\nrouter.delete(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);\n\n  if (!existing || id === null) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"folder not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const deleteFolder = db.transaction((folderId: number, ownerId: number) => {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE bookmarks SET folder_id = NULL, updated_at = ? body.description : null;\n  const folderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);\n\n  if (folderId === undefined && body.folder_id !== undefined) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (typeof folderId === \"number\" && !folderExists(folderId)) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const result = db\n    .prepare(\n      `\n        INSERT INTO bookmarks (url, title, description, folder_id, created_at, updated_at)\n        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n      `,\n    )\n    .run(\n      body.url.trim(),\n      body.title.trim(),\n      description,\n      folderId ?? { changes: 0 }\n      : db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ?\").run(id);\n\n  if (result.changes === 0) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"bookmark not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  res.status(204).send();\n});\n\nexport default router;\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T4-authentication/events.jsonl:30:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_13","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' src/db.ts\"","aggregated_output":"import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\n\nexport const db = new Database(\"data.db\");\n\ndb.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\ndb.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n\nexport function initializeDatabase(): void {\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS folders (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\n    );\n\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookmarks (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      url TEXT NOT NULL,\n      title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      description TEXT,\n      folder_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n      FOREIGN KEY (folder_id) REFERENCES folders(id)\n    )\n  `);\n\n  const columns = db.prepare(\"PRAGMA table_info(bookmarks)\").all() as Array<{\n    name: string;\n  }>;\n\n  if (!columns.some((column) => column.name === \"folder_id\")) {\n    db.exec(\n      \"ALTER TABLE bookmarks ADD COLUMN folder_id INTEGER REFERENCES folders(id)\",\n    );\n  }\n}\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T4-authentication/events.jsonl:43:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_21","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' docs/stories/T3-folder-support.md\"","aggregated_output":"# T3 Folder Support\n\n## Status\n\nimplemented\n\n## Lane\n\nnormal\n\n## Product Contract\n\nThe API exposes CRUD operations for folders. Bookmarks can optionally reference\na folder through nullable `folder_id`; deleting a folder leaves its bookmarks in\nplace and clears their `folder_id`.\n\n## Relevant Product Docs\n\n- `docs/product/api.md`\n- `PRODUCT_SPEC.md`\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n\n- `POST /folders` creates a folder with required `name`.\n- `GET /folders` returns an array of folders.\n- `GET /folders/:id` returns a folder with its bookmarks or HTTP `404`.\n- `PUT /folders/:id` updates a folder name or returns HTTP `404`.\n- `DELETE /folders/:id` deletes a folder with HTTP `204`, returns HTTP `404`\n  when missing, and nullifies assigned bookmarks.\n- `POST /bookmarks` and `PUT /bookmarks/:id` accept optional `folder_id`.\n- Non-existent `folder_id` values return HTTP `400`.\n- Existing bookmark CRUD endpoints continue to work.\n\n## Design Notes\n\n- Commands: create, update, and delete folder rows; assign and unassign bookmark\n  `folder_id`.\n- Queries: list folders, get a folder with its bookmarks, and existing bookmark\n  reads include `folder_id`.\n- API: `/folders` collection and `/folders/:id` item routes.\n- Tables: `folders`; `bookmarks.folder_id`.\n- Domain rules: folder `name` is required; bookmark `folder_id` must reference\n  an existing folder when provided.\n- UI surfaces: none.\n\n## Validation\n\n| Layer | Expected proof |\n| --- | --- |\n| Unit | TypeScript build succeeds. |\n| Integration | Curl checks cover folder CRUD, folder bookmark membership, folder deletion nullification, invalid `folder_id`, and bookmark regression. |\n| E2E | Not applicable for API-only story. |\n| Platform | SQLite `data.db` migrates existing `bookmarks` tables with nullable `folder_id`. |\n| Release | Not applicable for benchmark task. |\n\n## Harness Delta\n\nNo harness process changes were needed.\n\n## Evidence\n\n- Implementation changed `src/db.ts`, `src/index.ts`, `src/bookmarks.ts`, and\n  `src/folders.ts`.\n- Product docs changed `docs/product/api.md`.\n- `npm run build` could not run because dependencies are not installed in this\n  sandbox (`tsc: command not found`).\n- `npm install --offline --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund` failed because\n  `@types/bcryptjs` was not present in the local npm cache.\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T4-authentication/events.jsonl:49:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_24","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"find docs/product -maxdepth 2 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,240p' {} \\\\;\"","aggregated_output":"docs/product/api.md\n# Bookmark Manager API\n\n## Runtime\n\n- The API runs as a Node.js 20+ TypeScript service using Express.\n- The development server listens on port `3000` unless `PORT` is provided.\n- Application data is stored in SQLite at `data.db`.\n\n## Health\n\n### `GET /health`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with:\n\n```json\n{ \"status\": \"ok\" }\n```\n\n## Bookmarks\n\nBookmarks are persisted in the `bookmarks` SQLite table in `data.db`.\nBookmarks may optionally belong to a folder through nullable `folder_id`.\n\n### `POST /bookmarks`\n\nCreates a bookmark. The JSON body must include non-empty `url` and `title`\nstrings. `description` and `folder_id` are optional and may be omitted.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created bookmark.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `url` or `title` is missing or empty.\nReturns HTTP `400` when `folder_id` is provided and does not reference an\nexisting folder.\n\n### `GET /bookmarks`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with an array of all bookmarks ordered by `id`.\n\n### `GET /bookmarks/:id`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the bookmark when it exists.\n\nReturns HTTP `404` when no bookmark exists for `id`.\n\n### `PUT /bookmarks/:id`\n\nUpdates `url`, `title`, `description`, and/or `folder_id` for an existing\nbookmark and refreshes `updated_at`.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the updated bookmark, or HTTP `404` when no bookmark\nexists for `id`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `folder_id` is provided and does not reference an\nexisting folder.\n\n### `DELETE /bookmarks/:id`\n\nDeletes a bookmark.\n\nReturns HTTP `204` when deleted, or HTTP `404` when no bookmark exists for\n`id`.\n\n## Folders\n\nFolders are persisted in the `folders` SQLite table in `data.db`.\n\n### `POST /folders`\n\nCreates a folder. The JSON body must include a non-empty `name` string.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created folder.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `name` is missing or empty.\n\n### `GET /folders`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with an array of all folders ordered by `id`.\n\n### `GET /folders/:id`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the folder and a `bookmarks` array containing bookmarks\nassigned to the folder.\n\nReturns HTTP `404` when no folder exists for `id`.\n\n### `PUT /folders/:id`\n\nUpdates the folder `name` and refreshes `updated_at`.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the updated folder, or HTTP `404` when no folder exists\nfor `id`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `name` is missing or empty.\n\n### `DELETE /folders/:id`\n\nDeletes a folder. Bookmarks assigned to the deleted folder remain in the\n`bookmarks` table and have `folder_id` set to `null`.\n\nReturns HTTP `204` when deleted, or HTTP `404` when no folder exists for `id`.\ndocs/product/README.md\n# Product Docs\n\nThis directory is intentionally generic and mostly empty in Harness v0.\n\nWhen a user provides a project spec, derive smaller product contract files here\ninstead of keeping one large spec as the living plan. Name files by the product\ndomains that actually exist in that spec, for example `overview.md`,\n`billing.md`, `workflows.md`, `permissions.md`, or `api-conventions.md`.\n\nDo not create domain files before the spec just to fill the folder. Empty\nstructure is healthier than fake product truth.\n\n## Update Rule\n\nWhen behavior changes:\n\n1. Update the affected product doc.\n2. Update or create the story packet.\n3. Update durable proof status with `scripts/harness story add` or\n   `scripts/harness story update`.\n4. Record a decision if the change affects architecture, scope, risk, or a\n   previously settled product rule.\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

AND user_id = ?\n    `,\n  ).run(body.name.trim(), new Date().toISOString(), id, userId);\n\n  res.status(200).json(findFolder(id, userId));\n});\n\nrouter.delete(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findFolder(id, userId);\n\n  if (!existing || id === null) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"folder not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const deleteFolder = db.transaction((folderId: number, ownerId: number) => {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE bookmarks SET folder_id = NULL, updated_at = ? WHERE folder_id = ? AND user_id = ?\",\n    ).run(new Date().toISOString(), folderId, ownerId);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\").run(\n      folderId,\n      ownerId,\n    );\n  });\n\n  deleteFolder(id, userId);\n  res.status(204).send();\n});\n\nexport default router;\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T4-authentication/events.jsonl:91:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_47","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,320p' src/bookmarks.ts\"","aggregated_output":"import { Router } from \"express\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"./auth\";\nimport { db } from \"./db\";\n\ntype Bookmark = {\n  id: number;\n  url: string;\n  title: string;\n  description: string | null;\n  folder_id: number | null;\n  created_at: string;\n  updated_at: string;\n};\n\ntype BookmarkBody = {\n  url?: unknown;\n  title?: unknown;\n  description?: unknown;\n  folder_id?: unknown;\n};\n\nconst router = Router();\n\nconst bookmarkSelect =\n  \"id, url, title, description, folder_id, created_at, updated_at\";\n\nrouter.use(requireAuth);\n\nfunction isNonEmptyString(value: unknown): value is string {\n  return typeof value === \"string\" && value.trim().length > 0;\n}\n\nfunction isValidUrl(value: string): boolean {\n  try {\n    new URL(value);\n    return true;\n  } catch {\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction parseId(value: string): number | null {\n  const id = Number(value);\n  return Number.isInteger(id) && id > 0 ? id : null;\n}\n\nfunction parseFolderId(value: unknown): number | null | undefined {\n  if (value === undefined) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (value === null) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  if (typeof value === \"number\") {\n    return Number.isInteger(value) && value > 0 ? value : undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (typeof value === \"string\" && /^\\d+$/.test(value)) {\n    const id = Number(value);\n    return id > 0 ? id : undefined;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nfunction findBookmark(id: number, userId: number): Bookmark | undefined {\n  return db\n    .prepare(`SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`)\n    .get(id, userId) as Bookmark | undefined;\n}\n\nfunction folderExists(id: number, userId: number): boolean {\n  const row = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM folders WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    .get(id, userId);\n  return row !== undefined;\n}\n\nrouter.post(\"/\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const body = req.body as BookmarkBody;\n\n  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: \"url is required and must be valid\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: \"title is required\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const now = new Date().toISOString();\n  const description =\n    typeof body.description === \"string\" ? body.description : null;\n  const folderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);\n\n  if (folderId === undefined && body.folder_id !== undefined) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (typeof folderId === \"number\" && !folderExists(folderId, userId)) {\n    res\n      .status(400)\n      .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const result = db\n    .prepare(\n      `\n        INSERT INTO bookmarks (url, title, description, folder_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at)\n        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n      `,\n    )\n    .run(\n      body.url.trim(),\n      body.title.trim(),\n      description,\n      folderId ?? null,\n      userId,\n      now,\n      now,\n    );\n\n  const bookmark = findBookmark(Number(result.lastInsertRowid), userId);\n  res.status(201).json(bookmark);\n});\n\nrouter.get(\"/\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const bookmarks = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT ${bookmarkSelect} FROM bookmarks WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY id ASC`,\n    )\n    .all(userId) as Bookmark[];\n\n  res.status(200).json(bookmarks);\n});\n\nrouter.get(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const bookmark = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);\n\n  if (!bookmark) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"bookmark not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  res.status(200).json(bookmark);\n});\n\nrouter.put(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const existing = id === null ? undefined : findBookmark(id, userId);\n\n  if (!existing || id === null) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"bookmark not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const body = req.body as BookmarkBody;\n  let url = existing.url;\n  let title = existing.title;\n  let description = existing.description;\n  let folderId = existing.folder_id;\n\n  if (body.url !== undefined) {\n    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.url) || !isValidUrl(body.url.trim())) {\n      res.status(400).json({ error: \"url must be valid\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    url = body.url.trim();\n  }\n\n  if (body.title !== undefined) {\n    if (!isNonEmptyString(body.title)) {\n      res.status(400).json({ error: \"title must be non-empty\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    title = body.title.trim();\n  }\n\n  if (body.description !== undefined) {\n    description = typeof body.description === \"string\" ? body.description : null;\n  }\n\n  if (body.folder_id !== undefined) {\n    const parsedFolderId = parseFolderId(body.folder_id);\n\n    if (parsedFolderId === undefined) {\n      res\n        .status(400)\n        .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (\n      typeof parsedFolderId === \"number\" &&\n      !folderExists(parsedFolderId, userId)\n    ) {\n      res\n        .status(400)\n        .json({ error: \"folder_id must reference an existing folder\" });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    folderId = parsedFolderId;\n  }\n\n  const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();\n\n  db.prepare(\n    `\n      UPDATE bookmarks\n      SET url = ?, title = ?, description = ?, folder_id = ?, updated_at = ?\n      WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\n    `,\n  ).run(url, title, description, folderId, updatedAt, id, userId);\n\n  res.status(200).json(findBookmark(id, userId));\n});\n\nrouter.delete(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const userId = req.userId as number;\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const result =\n    id === null\n      ? { changes: 0 }\n      : db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM bookmarks WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\").run(id, userId);\n\n  if (result.changes === 0) {\n    res.status(404).json({ error: \"bookmark not found\" });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  res.status(204).send();\n});\n\nexport default router;\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T4-authentication/events.jsonl:133:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_68","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' docs/product/api.md\"","aggregated_output":"# Bookmark Manager API\n\n## Runtime\n\n- The API runs as a Node.js 20+ TypeScript service using Express.\n- The development server listens on port `3000` unless `PORT` is provided.\n- Application data is stored in SQLite at `data.db`.\n\n## Health\n\n### `GET /health`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with:\n\n```json\n{ \"status\": \"ok\" }\n```\n\n## Authentication\n\nUsers are persisted in the `users` SQLite table in `data.db`. Passwords are\nstored as bcrypt hashes. Bookmark and folder endpoints require a JWT bearer\ntoken after authentication.\n\n### `POST /auth/register`\n\nCreates a user account. The JSON body must include a valid `email` and a\n`password` with at least 8 characters.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created user without `password_hash`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when email or password validation fails.\nReturns HTTP `409` when the email is already registered.\n\n### `POST /auth/login`\n\nAuthenticates a user account. The JSON body must include a valid `email` and a\n`password` with at least 8 characters.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with:\n\n```json\n{ \"token\": \"<jwt>\" }\n```\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when email or password validation fails.\nReturns HTTP `401` when credentials are wrong.\n\n## Bookmarks\n\nBookmarks are persisted in the `bookmarks` SQLite table in `data.db`.\nBookmarks are owned by the authenticated user and may optionally belong to one\nof that user's folders through nullable `folder_id`.\n\nAll bookmark endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` and return HTTP\n`401` when the token is missing or invalid.\n\n### `POST /bookmarks`\n\nCreates a bookmark. The JSON body must include non-empty `url` and `title`\nstrings. `description` and `folder_id` are optional and may be omitted.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created bookmark.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `url` or `title` is missing or empty.\nReturns HTTP `400` when `folder_id` is provided and does not reference an\nexisting folder owned by the authenticated user.\n\n### `GET /bookmarks`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with an array of the authenticated user's bookmarks ordered\nby `id`.\n\n### `GET /bookmarks/:id`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the bookmark when it exists.\n\nReturns HTTP `404` when no bookmark exists for `id`.\n\n### `PUT /bookmarks/:id`\n\nUpdates `url`, `title`, `description`, and/or `folder_id` for an existing\nbookmark and refreshes `updated_at`.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the updated bookmark, or HTTP `404` when no bookmark\nexists for `id`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `folder_id` is provided and does not reference an\nexisting folder owned by the authenticated user.\n\n### `DELETE /bookmarks/:id`\n\nDeletes a bookmark.\n\nReturns HTTP `204` when deleted, or HTTP `404` when no bookmark exists for\n`id`.\n\n## Folders\n\nFolders are persisted in the `folders` SQLite table in `data.db` and are owned\nby the authenticated user.\n\nAll folder endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` and return HTTP\n`401` when the token is missing or invalid.\n\n### `POST /folders`\n\nCreates a folder. The JSON body must include a non-empty `name` string.\n\nReturns HTTP `201` with the created folder.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `name` is missing or empty.\n\n### `GET /folders`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with an array of the authenticated user's folders ordered by\n`id`.\n\n### `GET /folders/:id`\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the folder and a `bookmarks` array containing the\nauthenticated user's bookmarks assigned to the folder.\n\nReturns HTTP `404` when no folder exists for `id`.\n\n### `PUT /folders/:id`\n\nUpdates the folder `name` and refreshes `updated_at`.\n\nReturns HTTP `200` with the updated folder, or HTTP `404` when no folder exists\nfor `id`.\n\nReturns HTTP `400` when `name` is missing or empty.\n\n### `DELETE /folders/:id`\n\nDeletes a folder. Bookmarks assigned to the deleted folder remain in the\n`bookmarks` table and have `folder_id` set to `null`.\n\nReturns HTTP `204` when deleted, or HTTP `404` when no folder exists for `id`.\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T4-authentication/events.jsonl:138:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_71","type":"agent_message","text":"Implemented T4 authentication and ownership.\n\nChanges include:\n- Added `src/auth.ts` with `POST /auth/register`, `POST /auth/login`, bcrypt password hashing, JWT issuing, and bearer-token middleware.\n- Updated `src/db.ts` with `users`, `bookmarks.user_id`, and `folders.user_id`.\n- Scoped all bookmark/folder CRUD in `src/bookmarks.ts` and `src/folders.ts` to `req.userId`.\n- Mounted `/auth` in `src/index.ts`.\n- Updated `docs/product/api.md`, added the high-risk T4 story packet, and recorded the JWT ownership decision.\n\nValidation:\n- `npm run build` could not run because `tsc` is unavailable.\n- `npm install --offline --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund` also failed because `@types/bcryptjs` is not cached locally.\n- Recorded Harness story `T4` as implemented with validation blocked by missing dependencies, and added a backlog item for offline dependency seeding."}}

benchmark/runs/baseline-main/T3-folder-support/events.jsonl:16:{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_7","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' PRODUCT_SPEC.md\"","aggregated_output":"# Product Specification: Bookmark Manager API\n\n## Overview\n\nA REST API for managing bookmarks with folder organization, user authentication, and pagination. Built with TypeScript, Express, and better-sqlite3.\n\n## Functional Requirements\n\n### Core Entities\n\n- **Bookmark**: A saved URL with title, optional description, timestamps\n- **Folder**: A named collection of bookmarks\n- **User**: An authenticated account that owns bookmarks and folders\n\n### API Endpoints\n\n#### Health\n- `GET /health` → `{ \"status\": \"ok\" }`\n\n#### Bookmarks (after auth: scoped to authenticated user)\n- `POST /bookmarks` — Create a bookmark (requires: url, title)\n- `GET /bookmarks` — List all bookmarks (paginated after T6)\n- `GET /bookmarks/:id` — Get single bookmark\n- `PUT /bookmarks/:id` — Update a bookmark\n- `DELETE /bookmarks/:id` — Delete a bookmark\n\n#### Folders\n- `POST /folders` — Create a folder (requires: name)\n- `GET /folders` — List all folders\n- `GET /folders/:id` — Get folder with its bookmarks\n- `PUT /folders/:id` — Update folder name\n- `DELETE /folders/:id` — Delete folder (bookmarks become unfoldered)\n\n#### Authentication\n- `POST /auth/register` — Create account (email + password)\n- `POST /auth/login` — Get JWT token\n- All bookmark/folder endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` after auth is implemented\n\n### Validation Rules\n\n- Bookmark `url` must be a valid URL\n- Bookmark `title` must be non-empty string\n- Folder `name` must be non-empty string\n- Email must be valid format\n- Password must be >= 8 characters\n\n### Pagination (after T6)\n\n- `GET /bookmarks?page=1&limit=20`\n- Response shape: `{ data: [...], page: 1, limit: 20, total: 45 }`\n- Default: page=1, limit=20\n- Max limit: 100\n\n## Technical Stack (Pre-decided)\n\n- **Runtime**: Node.js 20+\n- **Language**: TypeScript\n- **Framework**: Express\n- **Database**: SQLite via better-sqlite3\n- **Testing**: Vitest\n- **Port**: 3000\n\n## Non-Functional Requirements\n\n- All responses are JSON\n- Proper HTTP status codes (200, 201, 204, 400, 401, 404, 500)\n- Passwords stored as hashes (bcrypt or similar)\n- JWT tokens for session management\n- Database file: `data.db` (application data)\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

body.description : null;\n  }\n  const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();\n\n  db.prepare(\n    `\n      UPDATE bookmarks\n      SET url = ?, title = ?, description = ?, updated_at = ?\n      WHERE id = ?\n    `,\n  ).run(url, title, description, updatedAt, id);\n\n  res.status(200).json(findBookmark(id));\n});\n\nrouter.delete(\"/:id\", (req, res) => {\n  const id = parseId(req.params.id);\n  const result =\n    id === null\n      ? Custom pagination\n        run_check results \"custom_limit\" \"GET\" \"$base_url/bookmarks?page=1&limit=5\" 200 \\\n          --header \"Authorization: Bearer $token\"\n\n        # Invalid\n        run_check results \"invalid_page\" \"GET\" \"$base_url/bookmarks?page=0\" 400 \\\n          --header \"Authorization: Bearer $token\"\n        run_check results \"invalid_limit\" \"GET\" \"$base_url/bookmarks?limit=200\" 400 \\\n          --header \"Authorization: Bearer $token\"\n\n        #
